disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A lump in the neck/throat has expanded rapidly today with pain on swallowing and a sensation of partial blockage when swallowing liquids
trigger_question_examples: Are you having any trouble swallowing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The lump on the right of my neck and throat has swollen up fast today, it hurts to swallow, and it feels like there's a partial blockage — I can barely get water down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Difficulty swallowing liquids and a foreign-body/blockage sensation in the throat — potential upper-airway threat
trigger_question_examples: Can you swallow your own saliva and sip water?
Does it feel like your throat is closing or blocked?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Swallowing water is really hard now and it feels partly blocked; I'm sitting up because it's easier to breathe and swallow that way.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden high fever with rigors and drenching sweats tonight
trigger_question_examples: Have you had a fever or shaking chills?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Tonight I got a sudden high fever, I was shaking violently, and my bed sheets are soaked through with sweat.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Six-week history of painless, firm, mobile lumps in the neck and groin
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any lumps or swollen glands anywhere else?
How long have the lumps been there?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had painless firm lumps come up slowly in my neck and groin over the last 6 weeks — I could move them and they didn't hurt.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss of about 7 kg over 6 weeks
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight without trying?
Has your appetite or weight changed recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — I've dropped about 7 kg in the last month and a half without trying to.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fever unresponsive to paracetamol taken 2 hours earlier
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the fever?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took paracetamol about 2 hours ago and it hasn't touched the fever at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with no one present overnight
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you at home right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live alone and there's no one here with me tonight.
